title: BasicsModPlus
description: BasicsModPlus is the Fabric-native answer to all your server's core needs, bringing extra ESSENTIALS features you love with a distinct focus on effort.
body:
📧 Contact Me & Support Information ### 💬 Primary Support Channel (Preferred) **All general questions, feature requests, and non-urgent bug reports should be posted in the appropriate channels on our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/48sZCbdHzJ).** We actively monitor the server and will respond as soon as possible. This ensures that the whole community can benefit from the discussion and solutions. ### 🆘 Urgent Private Messaging (PM) Policy While we prefer all issues to be handled via the Discord server first, you are welcome to PM me directly under **specific urgent circumstances**: * **Allowed Reason:** Your server is **crashing** or experiencing **critical, game-breaking errors** directly related to one of my mods/plugins. * **Requirement:** You must be the **owner** of the server. * **Time Zone:** I am operating in the **(CET/CEST) Time Zone**. * **PM Hours:** Please only send private messages between **10:00 AM and 10:00 PM (Brussels Time)**. I will endeavor to answer your PM as soon as I can to be helpful and see what I can do to resolve your urgent issue. However, please understand that immediate responses are not guaranteed, and **private messaging is a professional courtesy, not an entitlement.** Thank you for your understanding and cooperation!
--- ## Commands * `/basicsmodplus`, `/bmp` (Display help for BasicsModPlus) * `/basicsmod`, `/bm` (When [BasicsMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/basicsmod) is present) * `/mods` (List loaded mods) * `/fly` (Toggle flight for yourself) * `/hat` (Wear an item as a hat) * `/feed` (Fully replenish your hunger) * `/heal` (Fully restore your health and clear most negative effects) * `/ext`, `/extinguish` (Put yourself out of fire) * `/repair` (Repair the item you're holding) * `/condense` (Condense items in your inventory into blocks or higher tiers) * `/sleep` (Force the game time to change to day or night, or allow others to sleep through the night) * `/day`, `/night`, `/noon`, `/midnight` (Set the time of day) * `/sun`, `/rain`, `/thunder` (Control the weather) * `/workbench`, `/wb` (Open a virtual workbench) * `/enderchest`, `/ec` (Open a virtual ender chest) * `/commandspy` (Toggle spying on other players' commands) * `/gm` (Change your gamemode) * `/smite` (Summon a lightning strike) * `/itemedit name`, `/itemedit lore add`, `/itemedit lore clear`, `/itemedit lore setline`, `/itemedit lore remline`, `/itemedit glint` (Edit an item's name, lore, or add a glint) * `/signedit` (Edit text on signs) * `/invsee` (View another player's inventory) * `/endsee` (View another player's ender chest) --- ## Permissions
Click to view all permission nodes and their descriptions * **Cooldown Node Explanation:** `NODEc.#` when `c.#` is present it adds a cooldown. `#` = NUMBER (Always in minutes). When a group has `NODEc.#` and a player should not have cooldown, give the player `NODEc.0` or add the same node again in false mode. * `basicsmod.help` (Allows access to the `/basicsmodplus` and `/bmp` commands. Default for all players. Note: If BasicsMod is present, `/basicsmod` and `/bm` take precedence.) * `basicsmod.mods` (Allows access to the `/mods` command. Requires OP Level 4.) * `basicsmod.fly` (Allows access to the `/fly` command. Requires OP Level 4.) * `basicsmod.fly.others` (Allows targeting other players with `/fly`.) * `basicsmod.hat` (Allows access to the `/hat` command. Requires OP Level 4.) * `basicsmod.hat.others` (Allows targeting other players with `/hat`.) * `basicsmod.hatc.#` (Sets a cooldown in minutes for the `/hat` command.) * `basicsmod.feed` (Allows access to the `/feed` command. Requires OP Level 4.) * `basicsmod.feed.others` (Allows targeting other players with `/feed`.) * `basicsmod.feedc.#` (Sets a cooldown in minutes for the `/feed` command.) * `basicsmod.heal` (Allows access to the `/heal` command. Requires OP Level 4.) * `basicsmod.heal.others` (Allows targeting other players with `/heal`.) * `basicsmod.heal.effect` (Allows clearing negative effects with `/heal`.) * `basicsmod.heal.extra` (Allows bonus effects with `/heal`.) * `basicsmod.healc.#` (Sets a cooldown in minutes for the `/heal` command.) * `basicsmod.extinguish` (Allows access to the `/ext` and `/extinguish` commands. Requires OP Level 4.) * `basicsmod.extinguish.others` (Allows targeting other players with `/extinguish`.) * `basicsmod.repair` (Allows access to the `/repair` command. Requires OP Level 4.) * `basicsmod.repair.free` (Bypasses repair costs for `/repair`.) * `basicsmod.repairc.#` (Sets a cooldown in minutes for the `/repair` command.) * `basicsmod.condense` (Allows access to the `/condense` command. Requires OP Level 4.) * `basicsmod.condense.all` (Allows condensing additional item types with `/condense`.) * `basicsmod.sleep` (Allows access to the `/sleep` command. Requires OP Level 4.) * `basicsmod.sleep.others` (Allows forcing others to 'sleep' with `/sleep`.) * `basicsmod.time` (Allows access to `/day`, `/night`, `/noon`, and `/midnight` commands. Requires OP Level 4.) * `basicsmod.timec.#` (Sets a cooldown in minutes for time commands.) * `basicsmod.weather` (Allows access to `/sun`, `/rain`, and `/thunder` commands. Requires OP Level 4.) * `basicsmod.weatherc.#` (Sets a cooldown in minutes for weather commands.) * `basicsmod.workbench` (Allows access to the `/wb` command. Requires OP Level 4.) * `basicsmod.enderchest` (Allows access to the `/ec` command. Requires OP Level 4.) * `basicsmod.commandspy` (Allows access to the `/commandspy` command. Requires OP Level 4.) * `basicsmod.gamemode.` (Allows access to the `/gm` command for a specific gamemode (e.g., `basicsmod.gamemode.creative`). Requires OP Level 4.) * `basicsmod.gamemode.*` (Wildcard for all gamemodes with `/gm`.) * `basicsmod.gamemode.others` (Allows targeting other players with `/gm`.) * `basicsmod.smite` (Allows access to the `/smite` command. Requires OP Level 4.) * `basicsmod.smite.*` (Allows striking all players with `/smite`.) * `basicsmod.itemedit` (Base permission for all `/itemedit` subcommands (`name`, `lore add/clear/setline/remline`, `glint`). Requires OP Level 4.) * `basicsmod.signedit` (Allows access to the `/signedit` command. Requires OP Level 4.) * `basicsmod.invsee` (Allows access to the `/invsee` command. Requires OP Level 4.) * `basicsmod.endsee` (Allows access to the `/endsee` command. Requires OP Level 4.)
